title: Grilled Halibut with Cilantro Garlic Butter
ingredients: **Preheat the grill for high heat or the oven to 400°**
instructions:
Squeeze the juice from each lime wedge on the halibut filets. Season with the salt and pepper.
Cook the fish until it easily flakes with a fork and remove to a warm platter.
Heat the oil in a skillet over medium heat and add the garlic. Cook and stir just until fragrant. About 2 minutes.
Stir in the butter and the remaining lime juice. Add the cilantro and serve over the fish.
